zh.lifeSummary: 當Landrade de Louvain於1030年出生在比利時布拉班特洛文時，她的父親Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel33歲，母親Oda de Verdun42歲。她和Folkard van Gent至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1059年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯豪-德-享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Landrade de Louvain于1030年出生在比利时布拉班特洛文时，她的父亲Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel33岁，母亲Oda de Verdun42岁。她和Folkard van Gent至少有7个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1059年在法国i萊-德-福朗斯豪-德-享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Landrade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: De Andrade
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Armando, Geraldo, Gustavo, Alvaro, Ana Paula, Domingos, Fernando, Jacinto, Luis, Marcelo.  Portuguese Joao, Agostinho.
Portuguese and Galician: habitational name, formed with the preposition de ‘from’, for someone from a place called Andrade (see Andrade ). Compare D'Andrade .

en.lifeSummary: When Landrade de Louvain was born in 1030, in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium, her father, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, was 33 and her mother, Oda de Verdun, was 42. She had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Folkard van Gent. She died about 1059, in Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Landrade de Louvain est née en 1030, à Louvain, Brabant, Belgique, son père, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Oda de Verdun, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec Folkard van Gent. Elle est décédée environ 1059, à Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Landrade de Louvain 1030 in Leuven, Brabant, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel 33 und ihre Mutter Oda de Verdun 42. Sie hatte mit Folkard van Gent mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1059 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Landrade de Louvain è nata il nel 1030 nel Leuven, Brabante, Belgio, sua padre, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Oda de Verdun, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con Folkard van Gent. Morì circa 1059, nel Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Landrade de Louvainが1030年にベルギーブラバントレウベンで生まれた時，父Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brusselは33歳，母Oda de Verdunは42歳であった。彼女はFolkard van Gentとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1059年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスハウトス-デ-セアインで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Landrade de Louvain(이)가 1030년 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Oda de Verdun(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Folkard van Gent(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1059년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 하츠-데-세이인에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Landrade de Louvain nasceu em 1030, em Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica, seu pai, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Oda de Verdun, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com Folkard van Gent. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1059, em Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, França, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Landrade de Louvain родилась в 1030 г. в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Oda de Verdun, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от Folkard van Gent. Она умерла около 1059 г. в местности хауц-де-син, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 30 лет.

sm.from 1031 to 1034: mai le 1031 e o'o I le 1034

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Landrade de Louvain nació en 1030, en Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica, su papá, Lambert II 'Balderik' graaf van Leuven en Brussel, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Oda de Verdun, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas con Folkard van Gent. Murió aproximadamente 1059, en Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 30 años.
